creator: bugs.freebsd.asc@schwarzes.net
text:
It's a little bit confusing, I got the following output when upgrading from 13.2 to 13.3,
but this seems related to the fix itself (which tries to delete the former files).

root@olinguito:~ # /usr/sbin/freebsd-update install
src component not installed, skipped
Installing updates...rm: ///usr/include/c++/v1/__tuple: is a directory
rm: ///usr/include/c++/v1/__string: is a directory
